overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban environment. The player character walks along a narrow sidewalk, passes beneath a highway overpass with large digital billboards, ascends a concrete staircase, and arrives at an NCART transit station plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban sidewalk next to concrete retaining wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow sidewalk next to a concrete wall, approaching a highway overpass

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as ego

entered.detail: tall weathered concrete wall running along the left side of the sidewalk with graffiti markings
large vertical billboard with red background displaying a white stylized face logo and Japanese text
tall street lamp with warm yellow light illuminating the sidewalk
massive concrete highway overpass structure spanning across the road ahead
multi-lane city street with asphalt surface and yellow lane markings

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking along a narrow urban sidewalk at night. A tall concrete wall runs along the left side featuring a prominent red neon billboard, while the right side opens to a multi-lane road. The camera moves steadily forward toward a large highway overpass visible in the distance, with a single pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath highway overpass with advertising displays

events.description: walks under the highway overpass entering a covered area with large illuminated billboards overhead
passes a pedestrian walking in the same direction on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the overpass, passing other pedestrians and approaching a staircase

notable_agents.action: walking past ego on the left side heading in the same direction

entered.detail: series of large illuminated digital billboards mounted on the overpass showing car advertisements and brand logos
thick cylindrical concrete pillar supporting the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to walking beneath the massive highway overpass, creating a semi-covered environment. Large digital billboards are mounted overhead displaying bright advertisements that illuminate the area. The concrete support pillars of the overpass become prominent on the left. The camera passes a pedestrian and continues toward a staircase visible ahead, while sparse vehicle traffic moves on the road to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: staircase leading to elevated NCART transit station plaza

events.description: begins ascending the wide concrete staircase to the upper plaza level
reaches the top of the stairs and enters the NCART station plaza with neon signage

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs to the upper level, then walking toward the NCART station entrance past security personnel

notable_agents.action: security officer standing guard near the NCART station entrance next to a parked vehicle

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading upward to the elevated plaza
futuristic transit station entrance with glowing teal NCART signage and purple neon lights
futuristic black security or police vehicle parked near the station entrance
orange and blue construction barriers and traffic cones scattered on the plaza

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the ascent up a wide concrete staircase beneath the overpass structure. Upon reaching the top, the scene opens into an elevated plaza featuring the NCART transit station entrance with distinctive teal neon signage. The area contains scattered debris, orange construction barriers, and a security vehicle parked near the entrance. The camera approaches the station entrance where security personnel are stationed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit urban corridor that transitions from a narrow street into an elevated transit plaza. It begins with a steady walk along a sidewalk flanked by a tall concrete wall and a glowing red billboard, moving toward a distant highway overpass. As the camera passes beneath the massive structure, the environment becomes semi-covered and illuminated by bright overhead digital advertisements and heavy concrete pillars. The scene then shifts as the camera ascends a wide concrete staircase, leaving the sheltered overpass behind. Finally, the view opens onto an elevated plaza featuring the teal neon signage of an NCART transit station, complete with orange construction barriers and security personnel stationed near the entrance.
